chart.prompt: Umsatz pro Monat aktuelles Jahr (YTD) im Vergleich zum Vorjahr aus Rechnungen, zwei Serien
chart.sql_string:
WITH monthly_sales AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', i.date) AS month_start,
    EXTRACT(year FROM i.date) AS sales_year,
    ROUND(SUM(i.net_revenue), 2) AS net_revenue
  FROM invoices i
  WHERE i.status NOT IN ('canceled', 'created', 'unknown')
    AND i.date BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) AND CURRENT_DATE
       OR i.date BETWEEN DATEADD('year', -1, DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE))
                    AND DATEADD('year', -1, CURRENT_DATE)
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(month_start, 'MM') AS "Monat",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN sales_year = EXTRACT(year FROM CURRENT_DATE) THEN net_revenue END), 0) AS "Umsatz aktuelles Jahr YTD",
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN sales_year = EXTRACT(year FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1 THEN net_revenue END), 0) AS "Umsatz Vorjahr",
  ROUND(
    COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN sales_year = EXTRACT(year FROM CURRENT_DATE) THEN net_revenue END), 0)
    - COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN sales_year = EXTRACT(year FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1 THEN net_revenue END), 0),
    2
  ) AS "Differenz"
FROM monthly_sales
GROUP BY 1, month_start
ORDER BY month_start;

en.title: Revenue YTD vs. last year
en.description: Year-to-date revenue per month compared to the same month last year — quickly spots growth or contraction vs. baseline.

de.title: Umsatz YTD vs. Vorjahr
de.description: Umsatz pro Monat seit Jahresbeginn im Vergleich zum gleichen Monat im Vorjahr — sieht Wachstum oder Rückgang gegen die Baseline.
